violations.detail: Ruby 2.7 is past upstream end-of-life — the upstream Ruby team no longer publishes security patches as of 2023-03-31. Production images on this branch will accumulate unfixed CVEs over time. Migrate to a currently-supported branch (Ruby 3.4, Ruby 3.3, Ruby 3.2) — see https://www.ruby-lang.org/en/downloads/branches/ for the upstream support matrix.
violations.message: Base image uses an end-of-life Ruby version with no upstream security patches

suggestedFix.description: Bump the Ruby base image to a supported branch (3.4)
